freeTextAnnotations.text:
## Welcome!

Get started by selecting a `ceos` or `Linux` node from the palette and dragging it into the topology canvas.

Add links by right-clicking nodes and selecting `Create Link.`

Linux hosts can be configured by right-clicking and selecting `Edit Node` and then `Configuration.`

The following can be configured on a Linux Host:
- IPv4 Address
- IPv6 address (*optional*)
- MAC Address (*optional*)
- Default Gateway
- Connect Mode (*optional*): `lacp` or `none.`

Any *optional* value can be deleted or left blank in the `Configuration` section.

### Tip

If the topology canvas is locked (indicated by the red padlock at the top of the palette)

Simply click the lock to unlock the topology to begin editing!

### *Delete this text block at any time by right-clicking it and selecting `Delete Text`*
